responsibilities: Develop hydrologic and hydraulic models using HEC-RAS and HEC-HMS to design stormwater and floodplain management systems
Design water distribution and conveyance systems to meet municipal capacity, pressure, and regulatory requirements
Conduct floodplain studies and watershed analyses to support FEMA compliance and flood risk mitigation planning
Prepare construction documents, specifications, and engineering calculations for water and wastewater infrastructure projects
Coordinate with regulatory agencies to secure permits for stormwater discharge, wetland impacts, and water resource projects
Perform sediment transport and erosion analyses to evaluate the long-term stability of waterways and drainage channels
Collaborate with civil and environmental engineers to integrate water resource designs into broader infrastructure projects
Conduct field investigations and data collection to validate hydraulic models and support design recommendations
